Grill-confirmed v1.0 finalization plan: 6 items, ordered by risk. (1) Remove retainToOmp dead code, (2) Fix YAML frontmatter roundtrip bug, (3) Un-cache capability detection per turn, (4) Align version to 1.0.0 across all artifacts, (5) Update consumer docs + delete non-consumed planning artifacts, (6) Fix flaky tests + final verification.
